violations.description: Hard wait of 1500ms creates unnecessary delay
Hard wait of 1500ms creates unnecessary delay
violations.suggestion: Replace with conditional wait for element or response

violations.description: Integration tests cleanup database with DELETE operations in beforeEach/afterEach
violations.suggestion: Consider transaction rollback for faster cleanup in integration tests

violations.description: Duplicate login code across tests adds unnecessary execution time
violations.suggestion: Extract to helper function to reduce code duplication and improve maintainability

recommendations: Replace waitForTimeout(1500) with conditional waits (expect().toBeVisible() or waitForResponse)
Consider using transaction rollback instead of DELETE for integration test cleanup
Extract duplicate login code to helper functions for better performance
Use test.describe.configure({ mode: 'parallel' }) to enforce parallel execution
Tests are well-structured for parallelization - 95% can run in parallel
summary: Good test performance with 95% parallelizable. 2 MEDIUM violations (hard waits), 2 LOW violations (cleanup efficiency). No HIGH severity issues. Tests use efficient selectors (getByTestId) and proper cleanup patterns.
